designBrief.silhouette: workshop body with repair dish and manipulator arms — must read as support
designBrief.palette: cool steel blue with blue/white emissive accents
designBrief.rtsReadabilityNotes: Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

promptCandidates: Stylized seamless sci-fi military vehicle hull texture sheet for a blue faction mobile repair / logistics support in an alien RTS. Material: precision-machined composite, clean panel seams. Palette: cool steel blue with blue/white emissive accents, with a subtle low-contrast camouflage pattern in the faction hue. Rich surface detail: riveted armor plates, weld seams, maintenance hatches and access panels, air intakes and cooling grilles, stowed spare parts (track links, tool boxes), strapped-down reserve fuel canisters, scuffed edges and oil stains. Alien design language: modular, sensor-studded, ordered geometry, shield emitter nodes. Faction markings as abstract glyphs and small stencil icons. Forbidden: weapons, siege barrels. Must stay readable from an isometric RTS camera at distance; no noisy micro-detail that shimmers; faction accent visible but not overwhelming; no text.

notes: Gameplay stats are defined in src/data/unitClasses.ts and were not touched.
